description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a zip-up bomber jacket and athletic track pants with side stripes. The figure stands upright with hands in the jacket pockets, exuding a relaxed and confident demeanor. The jacket appears to be made of a synthetic or leather-like material, while the pants are likely polyester or a similar fabric, and the shoes are athletic sneakers. The individual has short, neatly styled hair and a clean-shaven face. The overall build is average, with a realistic human body proportion and posture. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing style is typical for everyday streetwear in an urban environment.
description: An adult male in casual streetwear, wearing a bomber jacket, track pants, and sneakers, standing with hands in pockets. The figure has short hair and a relaxed, upright posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, full jacket, and both hands in pockets, with clear visibility of the track pants and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the jacket's side, and the stripes on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, jacket, and pants, with both legs and shoes visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, jacket's contour, and the side stripes on the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual bomber jacket and athletic track pants with side stripes
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands in pockets
